metadata.name: Redeem Gift Certificate for a Tour

description: A customer wants to use a gift certificate to pay for a hot air balloon ride.

nodes.task_description: Check availability for the hot air balloon ride.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms availability on the desired date.

nodes.task_description: Validate the customer's gift certificate number and its balance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the gift certificate is valid and has sufficient funds to cover the tour.

nodes.task_description: Book the tour, applying the gift certificate as payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully books the tour and redeems the gift certificate.
